## Checklist
<!-- Before merging, ensure all project requirements are met -->
- [ ] My code compiles/runs without errors locally.
- [ ] The project CI (`nix flake check`) passes successfully.
- [ ] I have reviewed the code before opening the PR.
- [ ] I have added or updated the documentation if necessary.
- [ ] The commits maintain the pipeline in a 100% functional state.
